sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIBYLLE (-[25 Mar 1270/Apr 1277]).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIBYLLE de Montbéliard, daughter of THIERRY [III] Comte de Montbéliard [Montfaucon] & his wife Alix de Ferrette [Pfirt] (-[25 Mar 1270/Apr 1277]).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard於大約1228年出生時，她的父親Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III24歲，母親Alix de Ferrette19歲。她和Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1270年3月25日享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard于大约1228年出生时，她的父亲Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III24岁，母亲Alix de Ferrette19岁。她和Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1270年3月25日享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sibylle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alain, Etienne, Jean-Michael.
French: from the female personal name Sibille, from Greek Sibylla (see Sibley ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard was born about 1228, her father, Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III, was 24 and her mother, Alix de Ferrette, was 19. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel. She died on 25 March 1270, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard est née environ 1228, son père, Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alix de Ferrette, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel. Elle est décédée le 25 mars 1270, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard um 1228 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III 24 und ihre Mutter Alix de Ferrette 19. Sie hatte mit Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. März 1270 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard è nata il circa 1228, sua padre, Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Alix de Ferrette, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel. Morì il 25 marzo 1270, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliardが約1228年に生まれた時，父Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' IIIは24歳，母Alix de Ferretteは19歳であった。彼女はRudolph IV de Neuchâtelとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1270年3月25日に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard(이)가 대략 1228년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Ferrette(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 3월 25일 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard nasceu aproximadamente 1228, seu pai, Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Ferrette, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel. Ela faleceu em 25 de março de 1270, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard родилась около 1228 г., её отцу по имени Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de Ferrette, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel. Она умерла 25 марта 1270 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibylle de Montfaucon-Montbéliard nació aproximadamente 1228, su papá, Thierry de Montfaucon-Montbéliard 'Le Grand' III, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alix de Ferrette, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Rudolph IV de Neuchâtel. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1270, a la edad de 43 años.
